title: Omega-Grammotoxin SIA
summary: omega-Grammotoxin SIA (ω-grammotoxin SIA) is a protein toxin that inhibits P, Q, and N  voltage-gated calcium channels (Ca2+ channels) in neurons.
text: omega-Grammotoxin SIA (ω-grammotoxin SIA) is a protein toxin that inhibits P, Q, and N  voltage-gated calcium channels (Ca2+ channels) in neurons.
